# Custom Voice

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/customVoices`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/customVoices/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-BJ1rax_c.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-custom-voice`
- `query-custom-voice-single`
- `query-custom-voices-list`
- `query-presets-voices-list`
- `delete-custom-voice`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/general/custom-voices`
- `/v1/general/custom-voices/{id}`
- `/v1/general/presets-voices`
- `/v1/general/delete-voices`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Custom Voice",zh:"自定义音色"},endpoints:[{id:"create-custom-voice",method:"POST",path:"/v1/general/custom-voices",title:{en:"Create Custom Voice",zh:"创建自定义音色"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"voice_name",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Voice Name",zh:"音色名称"},notes:[{en:"- The maximum length of text content is 20 characters",zh:"- 文本内容最大长度 20 个字符"},{en:"- The voices that are no longer used after creation can be deleted through the API",zh:"- 创建后不再使用的音色可通过 API 删除"}]},{name:"voice_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The URL of voice data file",zh:"音色数据文件获取链接"},notes:[{en:"- Supports .mp3 / .wav audio file and .mp4 / .mov video file",zh:"- 支持 .mp3 / .wav / .mp4 / .mov 格式的音视频文件"},{en:"- The voice needs to be clean and free of noise, with only one type of human voice present, with a duration of no less than 5 seconds and no longer than 30 seconds",zh:"- 音频中人声需干净无杂音，有且只能有一种人声，时长不短于 5 秒且不长于 30 秒"}]},{name:"video_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Generated video ID, which can provide audio materials by referencing historical works",zh:"历史作品 ID，可通过引用历史作品提供音频素材"},notes:[{en:"- **Only videos that meet the following conditions can be used to customize voice:**\n  - The video is generated on V2.6 model and the value of sound parameter is on\n  - The video is generated through Avatar API\n  - The video is generated through Lip-Sync API",zh:"- **仅满足以下条件的视频可以用于定制音色：**\n  - 使用 V2.6 版本模型生成且开启 sound 参数值为 on 的视频\n  - 通过数字人 API 生成的视频\n  - 通过对口型 API 生成的视频"},{en:"- The voice needs to be clean and free of noise, with only one type of human voice present, with a duration of no less than 5 seconds and no longer than 30 seconds",zh:"- 音频中人声需干净无杂音，有且只能有一种人声，时长不短于 5 秒且不长于 30 秒"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task.
```
